zh.lifeSummary: 當Ebles I de Grandson於大約1087年出生在瑞士瓦特格藍德森時，他的父親Baron Conan 'Falko de La Sarraz' de Grandson42歲，母親Aelis de Ramerupt40歲。他於大約1109年與Adélaïde de Limbourg在瑞士瓦特拉 薩拉茲結婚。他們至少是6個兒子的父母。他去世於1132年5月15日在他的家鄉享年46歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ebles I de Grandson于大约1087年出生在瑞士瓦特格藍德森时，他的父亲Baron Conan 'Falko de La Sarraz' de Grandson42岁，母亲Aelis de Ramerupt40岁。他于大约1109年与Adélaïde de Limbourg在瑞士瓦特拉 薩拉茲结婚。他们至少是6个儿子的父母。他去世于1132年5月15日在他的家乡享年46岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Grandson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin): said to be a habitational name from Granson on Lake Neuchâtel (Switzerland).

History: The first known bearer of this surname is Rigaldus de Grancione (flourished 1040). The name was taken to Britain by Otes de Grandison (died 1328) and his brother. They were among a group of Savoyards who settled in England when Henry III married a granddaughter of the Count of Savoy.

nameMeanings.name: Ebles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Able , with post-medieval excrescent -s.
Americanized form of German and Dutch   Abels  .

variants.name: Able
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the younger son of Adam and Eve, who was murdered for reasons of jealousy by his brother Cain (Genesis 4:1–8). The Hebrew form is Hevel, ostensibly representing the vocabulary word hevel ‘breath, vapour’, and so taken to imply vanity or worthlessness. Abel is considered by the Christian Church to have been a pre-Christian martyr (see Matthew 23:35), and is invoked as a saint in the litany for the dying. Nevertheless, his name has not been much used either before or after its brief vogue among the Puritans.

en.lifeSummary: When Ebles I de Grandson was born about 1087, in Grandson, Vaud, Switzerland, his father, Baron Conan 'Falko de La Sarraz' de Grandson, was 42 and his mother, Aelis de Ramerupt, was 40. He married Adélaïde de Limbourg about 1109, in La Sarraz, Vaud, Switzerland. They were the parents of at least 6 sons. He died on 15 May 1132, in his hometown, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ebles I de Grandson est né environ 1087, à Grandson, Vaud, Suisse, son père, Baron Conan 'Falko de La Sarraz' de Grandson, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Aelis de Ramerupt, avait 40 ans. Il a épousé Adélaïde de Limbourg environ 1109, à La Sarraz, Vaud, Suisse. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils. Il est décédé le 15 mai 1132, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 46 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ebles I de Grandson um 1087 in Grandson, Waadt, Schweiz geboren wurde, war sein Vater Baron Conan 'Falko de La Sarraz' de Grandson 42 und seine Mutter Aelis de Ramerupt 40. Er hat um 1109 in La Sarraz, Waadt, Schweiz Adélaïde de Limbourg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne. Er starb am 15. Mai 1132 im Alter von 46 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ebles I de Grandson è nato il circa 1087 nel Grandson, Vaud, Svizzera, il suo padre, Baron Conan 'Falko de La Sarraz' de Grandson, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Aelis de Ramerupt, aveva 40 anni. Lui sposato Adélaïde de Limbourg circa 1109, nel La Sarraz, Vaud, Svizzera. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli. Morì il 15 maggio 1132, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 46 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ebles I de Grandsonが約1087年にスイスヴァウドグランドソンで生まれた時，父Baron Conan 'Falko de La Sarraz' de Grandsonは42歳，母Aelis de Rameruptは40歳であった。約1109年にスイスヴァウドラ サラズでAdélaïde de Limbourgと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子の親であった。彼は1132年5月15日に故郷で46歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ebles I de Grandson(이)가 대략 1087년 스위스 바드 그랜드슨에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Baron Conan 'Falko de La Sarraz' de Grandson(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Aelis de Ramerupt(은)는 40세였다. 그는 대략 1109년 스위스 바드 라 사라즈에서 Adélaïde de Limbourg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1132년 5월 15일 그의 고향에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ebles I de Grandson nasceu aproximadamente 1087, em Grandson, Vaud, Suiça, seu pai, Baron Conan 'Falko de La Sarraz' de Grandson, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Aelis de Ramerupt, tinha 40 anos. Ele casou-se com Adélaïde de Limbourg aproximadamente 1109, em La Sarraz, Vaud, Suiça. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos. Ele faleceu em 15 de maio de 1132, em sua cidade natal, com 46 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ebles I de Grandson родился около 1087 г. в местности грандсон, вауд, Швейцария, его отцу по имени Baron Conan 'Falko de La Sarraz' de Grandson было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Aelis de Ramerupt, 40. Он женился на женщине по имени Adélaïde de Limbourg около 1109 г. в местности ла сарраз, вауд, Швейцария. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей. Он умер 15 мая 1132 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 46 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ebles I de Grandson nació aproximadamente 1087, en Grandson, Vaud, Suiza, su papá, Baron Conan 'Falko de La Sarraz' de Grandson, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Aelis de Ramerupt, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Adélaïde de Limbourg aproximadamente 1109, en La Sarraz, Vaud, Suiza. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos. Murió el 15 de mayo de 1132, en su pueblo, a la edad de 46 años.
